title: Zhan Li Yunzi
content:
Zhan Li Yunzi
 is the ancestor and current ruler of the 
Zhan Family
. Despite having an average cultivation amongst the top-brass of the 
Allheaven Star System
, he has a very distinguished status there, even overshadowing 
Blood God
 who is much stronger than him. This is because he possesses the Zhan Family's treasures.

Links and References

Personality
[
]

He is very moody and temperamental.

Background
[
]

Once, he went on a rampage and extinguished 13 cultivation families.

History
[
]

Book Seven
[
]

He fought against the 
Moongazer Serpent
, alongside 
Master Flamespark
, 
Ancestor Shengong
, 
Xiang Yundong
, 
Five-Color Daoist
, 
Blood God
, and the old man from Gongsun Family. In the end, they managed to seal the Moongazer Serpent with the help of 
Master Lu Fu
.

Book Eight
[
]

He was the commander during the Northern Battle between the 
Alliance Star System
 and 
Allheaven Star System
 due to his control over the 18 Lou Fu.

Book Ten
[
]

After learning his ancestor 
Zhan Xingye
's fate from 
Wang Lin
, he buried the grudge between them and became extremely eager to fight with the 
Outer Realm
, awakening his bloodline's Battle Will in the process.
